title: centaurea esfandiarii
intro: Centaurea esfandiarii, also known as the Esfandiari's knapweed, is a flowering plant species native to Iran. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various gastrointestinal issues. Centaurea esfandiarii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional Persian medicine to treat various health conditions.
